data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] title-length-validator.sh no longer contains the v2 path guard pattern
  Verify: ! grep -q "'/\.tickets/'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

- [ ] title-length-validator.sh contains a path guard for the v3 event-sourced path OR a documented justification for removing the guard entirely
  Verify: grep -q 'tickets-tracker\|No path guard needed' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/title-length-validator.sh

- [ ] RED test from task 014f-a652 (test_title_length_validator_v3_path_guarded) now passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-title-length-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS' || grep -rq 'test_title_length_validator_v3' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
